allow: Bash(node -e "const k = require\('@kapso/whatsapp-cloud-api'\); const c = new k.WhatsAppClient\({baseUrl:'x',kapsoApiKey:'x'}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(c.messages\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const k = require\('@kapso/whatsapp-cloud-api'\); const c = new k.WhatsAppClient\({baseUrl:'x',kapsoApiKey:'x'}\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.messages\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const k = require\('@kapso/whatsapp-cloud-api'\); const c = new k.WhatsAppClient\({baseUrl:'x',kapsoApiKey:'x'}\); console.log\(c.messages.sendImage.toString\(\).slice\(0,300\)\)")
